title: coelogyne havilandii
intro: Coelogyne havilandii is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia, characterized by its small, white flowers and compact growth habit. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coelogyne havilandii are attributed to its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Coelogyne havilandii can be prepared as a herbal infusion, where the roots and leaves are steeped in hot water to release its active compounds, or as a decoction, where the plant material is boiled in water to create a stronger liquid extract.
